business_definition: Represents an authoritative regulatory requirement governing insurance operations.
Unique identifier assigned to the regulation.
Business scope governed by the regulation.
Date from which regulation becomes effective.
Date on which regulation expires if applicable.
Represents an organization responsible for issuing regulations.

example: Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India

business_definition: Geographical jurisdiction governed by the authority.

domain: rules or legal provisions supporting regulations.

business_definition: Represents executable insurance business rules derived from regulations.

example: Claims must be settled within prescribed timelines.

business_definition: Represents a mandatory regulatory compliance obligation.
Unique identifier assigned to the compliance requirement.
Represents version history of regulatory rules.
Represents structured interpretation of regulatory knowledge.

example: Settlement must occur within prescribed timelines.

business_definition: Represents AI-generated assessment of regulatory compliance and knowledge quality.
Overall explanation of regulatory knowledge quality.
Summary of regulatory knowledge coverage across insurance workflows.
